hooks.name: agents-effect-ts-universal-pre
hooks.description: Warns on TS/JS edits so .agents-compatible runtimes apply Effect TS and IIFE rules.
hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; case $f in *.ts|*.tsx) echo '{"systemMessage":".agents Effect mandate: generated/modified TypeScript must use Effect (`effect`), Schema, Option, Schedule, Layer/Context; do not add fp-ts."}' ;; *.js) echo '{"systemMessage":".agents IIFE mandate: browser/runtime JS must be generated from Effect TypeScript IIFE output unless explicitly waived."}' ;; esac; }

hooks.name: agents-fp-core-rust-pre
hooks.description: Warns on Rust edits so .agents-compatible runtimes apply fp-core functional Rust rules.
hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; case $f in *.rs|*/Cargo.toml|Cargo.toml) echo '{"systemMessage":".agents fp-core mandate: generated/modified Rust must use fp-core (`fp-core = 0.1.9`) where applicable, target >=95% functional style, and avoid new unwrap/expect/panic paths."}' ;; esac; }

hooks.name: agents-full-symbiosis-pre
hooks.description: Warns on governance edits so .agents-compatible runtimes keep rules, skills, agents, hooks, and evidence mirrored.
hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; case "$f" in */.claude/rules/*|*/.gemini/rules/*|*/.agents/rules/*|*/.claude/skills/*|*/.gemini/skills/*|*/.agents/skills/*|*/.claude/agents/*|*/.gemini/agents/*|*/.agents/agents/*|*/settings.json|*/settings.local.json|*/docs/webhooks/*) echo '{"systemMessage":"Full symbiosis parity gate: mirror rules, skills, agents, hooks, webhooks, task state, and evidence across Claude/Gemini/.agents/Codex/Pi/C3I; enforce Effect TS, fp-core Rust, Safe Rust, and Gleam/Rust-only automation."}' ;; esac; }

hooks.name: agents-effect-ts-universal-post
hooks.description: Post-edit Effect TS reminder for .agents-compatible runtimes.
hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; case $f in *.ts|*.tsx|*.js) echo '{"systemMessage":".agents Effect post-check: verify Effect imports, no fp-ts/TaskEither, Schema for external data, Option for absence, and IIFE source discipline for JS."}' ;; esac; }

hooks.name: agents-fp-core-rust-post
hooks.description: Post-edit fp-core Rust reminder for .agents-compatible runtimes.
hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; case $f in *.rs|*/Cargo.toml|Cargo.toml) echo '{"systemMessage":".agents Rust post-check: verify fp-core usage, Result/Option flow, folds/iterators/composition, isolated boundaries, and no new panic paths."}' ;; esac; }

hooks.name: agents-full-symbiosis-post
hooks.description: Post-edit reminder for .agents-compatible full symbiosis evidence and parity checks.
hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; case "$f" in */.claude/rules/*|*/.gemini/rules/*|*/.agents/rules/*|*/.claude/skills/*|*/.gemini/skills/*|*/.agents/skills/*|*/.claude/agents/*|*/.gemini/agents/*|*/.agents/agents/*|*/settings.json|*/settings.local.json|*/docs/webhooks/*) echo '{"systemMessage":"Full symbiosis post-check: run jq/link checks, verify mirrors, avoid gdrive, and record task/journal evidence before closure."}' ;; esac; }
